# Logo Concept Design

## Logo Design Ideas

### Option 1: Brain + Book + AI
```
    ╔══════════════════════════════╗
    ║         🧠                   ║
    ║      +  📚  =  🎯            ║
    ║         🤖                   ║
    ║                              ║
    ║          STUDYMIND           ║
    ╚══════════════════════════════╝
```

### Option 2: Shield + Neural Network
```
    ╔══════════════════════════════╗
    ║    ██████████████████████    ║
    ║    ██  AI + EDUCATION  ██    ║
    ║    ██    PRIVACY       ██    ║
    ║    ██    FIRST         ██    ║
    ║    ██████████████████████    ║
    ╚══════════════════════════════╝
```

### Option 3: Modern Abstract
```
    ╭──────────────────────╮
    │  ╭┄┄╮  ╭┄┄╮  ╭┄┄╮   │
    │  │A │  │I │  │S │   │
    │  ╰┄┄╯  ╰┄┄╯  ╰┄┄╯   │
    │      •••  •••       │
    │  •  LEARNING  •     │
    │    • PLATFORM •     │
    ╰──────────────────────╯
```

## Logo Usage
- Use in README.md header
- GitHub repository social preview
- Documentation headers
- Favicon for web application

## Color Scheme
- Primary: Blue (#2563EB) - AI/Technology
- Secondary: Green (#16A34A) - Education/Growth  
- Accent: Purple (#7C3AED) - Creativity/Innovation
- Background: Dark (#0F172A) - Professional

## File Formats Needed
- SVG (vector for web)
- PNG (128x128, 256x256, 512x512)
- ICO (favicon)
- Social media optimized versions
